acceptance: LoadContextFiles walks from workDir to root; loads first AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md at each level; higher dirs appear first; unit tests with temp dir hierarchy
description: Context file discovery per SD-003 and pi convention.
title: Implement context file discovery (AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md)

acceptance: Tool definitions include detailed descriptions with usage examples. System prompt explicitly instructs model to use tools for file operations. PromptGuidelines per tool (like pi). Models like gpt-oss-120b and qwen3-coder-next use write tool instead of outputting code as text.
title: Improve tool descriptions and system prompt for weaker models

acceptance: Hugo/Hextra microsite at docs/site or website/; demo reels recorded with asciinema or playwright; demos serve as E2E test coverage; site builds and deploys
description: Create a microsite for forge with demo reels showing end-to-end workflows. Pattern after ddx and helix sites. Demo recordings double as E2E test evidence.
title: Set up microsite with demo reels

acceptance: Replay(sessionLogPath) reads JSONL and renders human-readable conversation; shows system prompt, each turn, tool calls with I/O, token counts, cost per turn; output suitable for terminal; unit test with fixture session log
description: Implement session replay renderer per FEAT-005.
title: Implement session replay

acceptance: Anthropic provider implements StreamingProvider; uses anthropic-sdk-go NewStreaming; handles content_block_delta and tool_use events; sends final delta with Usage; e2e test tag
description: Anthropic provider streaming per SD-004.
title: Add ChatStream to Anthropic provider

acceptance: forge -p 'prompt' runs agent and prints result; forge -p @file reads from file; stdin prompt works; --json flag outputs JSON; exit codes 0/1/2; config loaded from .forge/config.yaml with env and flag overrides; forge log lists sessions; forge replay renders session; functional tests with built binary
description: Implement the forge CLI binary per FEAT-006 and SD-002.
title: Implement standalone forge CLI

acceptance: VirtualProvider implements forge.Provider; file-based dictionary lookup by prompt hash; inline response matching via pattern/substring; prompt normalization for stable hashes; RecordEntry for recording new pairs; deterministic replay with configurable delay; unit tests with temp dictionary
description: Port the virtual agent from ddx (cli/internal/agent/virtual.go) as a forge.Provider implementation. Enables deterministic testing without live LLM calls.
title: Implement virtual provider (dictionary replay)

acceptance: OpenAIProvider implements forge.Provider; uses openai-go SDK; configurable base URL; sends tools as OpenAI function defs; parses tool calls from response; reports token usage; retries with backoff on 429/500/503; 5s connection timeout; unit tests with mock server pass
description: Implement the OpenAI-compatible provider covering LM Studio, Ollama, OpenAI, Azure, etc. per FEAT-003.
title: Implement OpenAI-compatible provider

acceptance: prompt.Builder composes system prompt from: base text, tools section, guidelines, append text, context files, dynamic context (date/cwd/metadata); Build() returns assembled string; unit tests for each section and combined output
description: Core prompt builder per SD-003. Builder pattern with WithTools, WithGuidelines, WithContextFiles, WithAppend, WithWorkDir, WithDate, WithMetadata, Build methods.
title: Implement prompt.Builder for system prompt composition

acceptance: OpenAI provider implements StreamingProvider; uses openai-go NewStreaming; assembles tool call deltas; sends final delta with Usage; integration test against LM Studio with streaming

acceptance: Hugo site at website/ with Hextra theme; hugo build succeeds; landing page with project description; navigation structure for docs and demos

acceptance: LoadTemplate parses frontmatter (name, description) + content; LoadTemplates loads dir of templates; SubstituteArgs handles $1 $@ $ARGUMENTS ${@:N} ${@:N:L}; unit tests for all substitution patterns

acceptance: Integration test runs forge.Run() against real LM Studio; completes a file-read task; tool calling works; token counts reported; build tag integration; passes on vidar:1234 or bragi:1234

acceptance: consumeStream reads StreamDelta channel and assembles Response; emits EventLLMDelta per chunk via callback; falls back to Chat() when provider is not StreamingProvider; NoStream flag skips streaming; unit tests with mock StreamingProvider covering: text streaming, tool call assembly, Done signal, fallback, cancellation
description: Agent loop streaming integration per SD-004.
title: Implement stream consumption in agent loop

acceptance: StreamDelta struct with Content, ToolCallID/Name/Args, Usage, Done fields; StreamingProvider interface extending Provider with ChatStream; EventLLMDelta event type; NoStream field on Request; property test for StreamDelta JSON round-trip

acceptance: Property tests using rapid: session event marshal/unmarshal round-trip is identity; TokenUsage.Add is commutative and associative; pricing EstimateCost is monotonic in token count; at least 100 iterations per property
